With it's ergonomic design for comfort and 10m range for controlling your system, this remote control is convenient and stylish. Have you lost your remote control or has the dog chewed it again? This Onlineaudioelectrical remote control is the perfect replacement and will provide you with many hours of enjoyment all from the comfort of your sofa. Just insert batteries and away you go (sold separately).
